aids.title: NIST 5 Characteristics Mnemonic
aids.content:
"On Broad Roads, Elephants March"

O - On-demand Self-Service
B - Broad Network Access
R - Resource Pooling
E - (Rapid) Elasticity
M - Measured Service

Alternative: OBRE-M (sounds like 'Obra' - Spanish for 'work')

aids.title: Scaling Directions
aids.content:
Vertical (Up/Down) = Make machine BIGGER/smaller
  - Think: Elevator going UP
  
Horizontal (Out/In) = Add/remove MORE machines
  - Think: Army spreading OUT
